main.footerDescription: Every Home, Every Child For Christ.

home.welcomeHeader: Reaching Every Home, Every Child For Christ.
home.welcomeSubtitle:
At the heart of everything we do is a passionate mission: Reaching Every Home, Every Child for Christ. Whether you are a parent looking for inspiring resources, a ministry leader seeking to impact the next generation, or someone passionate about seeing young lives transformed by faith, you have found a community that shares your heart.

Explore our resources, connect with our mission, and join us as we partner together to bring the hope, love, and truth of Christ into every household and into the heart of every child across Asia.

grids.title: VBS Program
grids.description: Explore the freshest updates, themes, and toolkits for this season's Vacation Bible School programs.

grids.title: Latest Videos
grids.description: Tune into our newest lessons, event recaps, and animated series built directly for children.

grids.title: Sunday School Platforms
grids.description: Access robust systems, digital teachers' guides, and engaging interactive media apps.

grids.title: Mobilizing Legends
grids.description: Empowering young champions to become standard-bearers of faith in their areas.

grids.title: Partner Platforms
grids.description: See our collaborative network and resource alliances keeping local hubs active and equipped.
